content_body: What a wonderful weekend! This is our second time renting from Cabin Rentals of Georgia and both times were perfect. We stayed at the Serendipity cabin with extended family. The house was extremely comfortable, well appointed and super clean. We enjoyed beautiful views and the scenery. But the best thing about this place were Taylor, Travis and Gary, who helped us organize our activities and made sure that our visit was unforgettable. We will definitely be back. Thanks for everything!
title: Top Notch Customer Service and Beautiful Cabin
